name: get_session_id
description: Resolve and record the current agent session ID. Pass explicit session_id when the agent exposes one, channel_kind/chat_id for VibeAround-managed ACP sessions, or agent_kind=codex so VibeAround can read Codex MCP metadata. Include launch_id/profile_id/cwd when available so VibeAround can update the launch record.

session_id.description: Explicit current session ID exposed by the agent, if available.

agent_kind.description: Agent type (e.g. claude, codex, pi, gemini, cursor, kiro, qwen-code).

launch_id.description: Optional VibeAround launch id from $VIBEAROUND_LAUNCH_ID. If present, VibeAround records the resolved session against this launch.

profile_id.description: Optional VibeAround launch profile id from $VIBEAROUND_PROFILE_ID.

cwd.description: Absolute path to the current working directory / project workspace.

channel_kind.description: Value of $VIBEAROUND_CHANNEL_KIND env var (e.g. feishu, telegram, slack).

name: prepare_handover
description: Prepare a session handover. Returns a /pickup command that the user can send in any IM channel connected to VibeAround to resume the session there.

session_id.description: Your current session ID. If omitted, VibeAround will try to find the most recent session for the given cwd.

cwd.description: Absolute path to your current working directory / project workspace.

agent_kind.description: Your agent type (e.g. claude, codex, pi, gemini, cursor, kiro, qwen-code).

profile_id.description: Optional VibeAround launch profile id from $VIBEAROUND_PROFILE_ID. VibeAround-launched sessions should pass this value; external sessions may omit it and will be treated as direct.

name: register_workspace
description: Register a project workspace directory in VibeAround. Required before handover if the workspace is not already registered.

cwd.description: Absolute path to the project workspace directory to register.

name.description: Optional human-readable name for the workspace.

name: initialize_subagents
description: Initialize a VibeAround multi-agent turn. Creates one git branch/worktree per subagent, records the turn on the workspace thread, and returns a va-agent-protocol structure. The first supported mode is parallel.

thread_id.description: Value of $VIBEAROUND_THREAD_ID for the host workspace thread.

cwd.description: Absolute path to the host project workspace.

mode.description: Multi-agent coordination mode. Only parallel is supported initially.

name.description: Host-chosen display name for the subagent, e.g. John Planner.

agent_kind.description: Subagent CLI kind, e.g. claude or codex.

profile_id.description: Optional profile ID for this subagent.

task.description: Optional short task assignment for this subagent.

branch_prefix.description: Optional git branch prefix. Defaults to va/subagents.

name: wait_for_subagents
description: Wait for a VibeAround multi-agent turn to finish and return structured subagent reports. Host agents should call this after initialize_subagents before producing their final answer.

thread_id.description: Value of $VIBEAROUND_THREAD_ID for the host workspace thread.

turn_id.description: Optional multi-agent turn ID. Defaults to the latest turn on the thread.

timeout_ms.description: Optional maximum wait time in milliseconds. Defaults to 600000.

name: preview
description: Start a live preview for a running local server. Returns owner and share URLs. Pass session_id (use /va-session skill) for proper lifecycle management.

port.description: The localhost port where the dev server is running.

cwd.description: Absolute path to the project workspace directory.

session_id.description: Your agent session ID (use /va-session skill to resolve). Enables automatic dev-server cleanup when the session ends.

title.description: Optional title shown in the preview toolbar. Defaults to the workspace directory name.

name: md_preview
description: Preview a markdown file with beautiful GitHub-style rendering. Returns a shareable URL. The URL expires in 5 minutes.

file.description: Path to the markdown file (absolute, or relative to cwd).

cwd.description: Absolute path to the project workspace directory.

title.description: Optional title shown in the preview toolbar. Defaults to the filename.
